description.en: Everything you need to make a job-ready resume, including unlimited resume saves and edits.
description.zh: 制作就职简历所需的一切，包括无限次简历保存和编辑。

description.en: Includes all free features plus advanced features such as unlimited resume templates, job search integration, and more.
description.zh: 包括所有免费功能以及高级功能，如无限简历模板、求职搜索集成等。

weaknesses.en: Limited customization options for advanced users
weaknesses.zh: 高级用户可定制选项有限

weaknesses.en: No specific mention of customer support

targetAudience.en: Job seekers looking to create ATS-friendly resumes
targetAudience.zh: 寻求创建ATS友好简历的求职者

positioning.en: Rezi positions itself as a user-friendly, AI-powered resume builder that helps job seekers create optimized resumes for ATS scanners.
positioning.zh: Rezi 定位自己为一个用户友好、基于AI的简历构建器，帮助求职者创建适合ATS扫描器的优化简历。
